div1.entryFree: Sanity, a sound state: a happiness that often madness hits on, which reason and s. could not so prosperously be delivered of, Hml. II, 2, 214 (Qq sanctity). In I, 3, 21 Ff the sanctity and health of the whole state; probably a misprint for sanity. Similarly insanie in LLL V, 1, 28 was changed by the compositors to infamie.
